title: Subarray Product Less Than K
titleCn: 乘积小于 K 的子数组

testcases.input: nums = [10,5,2,6], k = 100 Output: 8 Explanation: The 8 subarrays that have product less than 100 are: [10], [5], [2], [6], [10, 5], [5, 2], [2, 6], [5, 2, 6] Note that [10, 5, 2] is not included as the product of 100 is not strictly less than k.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The 8 subarrays that have product less than 100 are: [10], [5], [2], [6], [10, 5], [5, 2], [2, 6], [5, 2, 6] Note that [10, 5, 2] is not included as the product of 100 is not strictly less than k.
